query:
SELECT bp.value_ref AS "space_id?"
             FROM block_properties bp
             JOIN blocks tgt ON tgt.id = bp.block_id
                            AND tgt.deleted_at IS NULL
            WHERE bp.block_id = COALESCE(
                    (SELECT page_id FROM blocks
                      WHERE id = ?1
                        AND deleted_at IS NULL),
                    ?1)
              AND bp.key = 'space'
            LIMIT 1
